'''鈭歨-k-s-p''' ('''kahaksepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waiver|waiver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waiver|waiver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-k-s-p
|-
! Lemma
| kahaksepoko
|}
